item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, our history shows that sacrificing individual rights for collective stability has been necessary during times of crisis.

notes: Agent A opens by disagreeing with the statement and warning that social priority can marginalize minorities, then shifts at turn 3 toward a more society-stability argument before ending on a balance/public-safety position. Agent B remains rights-first but concedes limited emergency exceptions with transparency, temporariness, and judicial review. Turn 6 includes non-Latin text in an English turn: "长期".
